laconfeDesc: #LaConfe30 awaits! Dive into the sights, sounds, and flavors of Belize, and make this an experience you’ll never forget.
experienceBelizeDesc2: Join us at #LaConfe30 and immerse yourself in the breathtaking beauty, rich traditions, and vibrant experiences that only Belize can offer!

roomExtras: Luxury accommodations • Beachfront location • World-class dining • Conference facilities

We're grateful to our amazing sponsors who make this event possible.
Their support helps us create an unforgettable experience for all attendees.

preconfeDays.name: Day 1
preconfeDays.description: Visit Western Belize on Day 1 of Preconfe with a combo of Mayan Ruin Exploration along with the natural beauty of Belize's Mountain Pine Ridge Landscape.

activityList.name: Food & Beverage: Lunch
Meeting Point: San Ignacio - [Welcome Center](https://maps.app.goo.gl/29P6avAFWqhHQs276)
Xunantunich: An iconic Maya archaeological site near San Ignacio. The highlight: climbing El Castillo (the main pyramid) and seeing the jungle, river, and vast panoramic views.
Rio On Pools: Natural pools and small waterfalls where you can swim and relax.

Pine Ridge: A landscape different from the typical “tropical” setting — pine trees, fresh air, trails, and a soft adventure vibe. Perfect if you want to experience natural Belize and take photos in the water.

preconfeDays.name: Day 2
preconfeDays.description: A Jungle adventure park. It's for people looking for adrenaline and a jungle vibe (guided nature activities). Very much an experience-based outing and great for groups.

activityList.name: Food & Beverage: None
Meeting Point: San Ignacio - Details TBA
Cave Tubing: Float through ancient limestone caves on an inner tube while guided through underground rivers.

preconfeDays.name: Day 2 - Night
preconfeDays.description: Get to Caye Caulker before Day 3 to enjoy Noche de Omertas/Amazonas/Glamazonas. There is no cost for registering for this event, but you will need to pay your personal tabs depending on your bar order. Registration is still required prior to attending this event for record keeping.

activityList.name: Meeting Point: Caye Caulker - Details TBA
Bar Hopping: Join your group (Omerta/Amazona/Glamazona) at your designated bar, then meet up together at the end of the night for a bash.
Accommodation: If attending this event, plan to book your own accommodation in Caye Caulker for the overnight.

Water Taxi: It's recommended to board the Water Taxi in Belize City at 3PM to attend this event. View the [San Pedro Belize Express water taxi schedule](https://belizewatertaxi.com/schedule/) here. The last boat to Caye Caulker leaves at 5:30 PM.

preconfeDays.name: Day 3
preconfeDays.description: Visit the island famous for its “Go Slow” vibe. Arrive at Caye Caulker and set off on a snorkeling tour that you can't miss!

activityList.name: Food & Beverage: Light Refreshments
Meeting Point: Caye Caulker - Details TBA
Catamaran Tour: Boat/catamaran tour with stops for swimming/snorkeling and marine life spotting. Ideal for groups because it's social and provides amazing photo opportunities

Water Taxi: Water Taxi fare is not included in this price. If traveling same day, it's recommended to board the 8AM boat to Caye Caulker and return on the 3:30PM boat back to Belize City. View the [San Pedro Belize Express water taxi schedule](https://belizewatertaxi.com/schedule/) here.

preconfeDays.name: Day 3 - Night
preconfeDays.description: Let's head back to Belize City to close out PreConfe with a bang.

activityList.name: Meeting Point: Belize City - [BTL Park](https://maps.app.goo.gl/2CLHq8yNNV6ypT2k6).
Party Bus: Pre-game with some music, lights, a route through the city.
Traveller's Bar: End the night at a local bar.

preconfeDays.name: Day 4
preconfeDays.description: Tour of Belize City to learn about history, culture, and key landmarks. Great if it's your first time: helps you get oriented, reduces stress, and gives you real context about the country.

activityList.name: Meeting Point: Belize City - [Fort George Area](https://maps.app.goo.gl/oPwjPMvtej5Be2Uo9)

loginRequired: You'll be asked to log in if you haven't already.
